# Fixture: p6b_work_experience_app_blocked
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 8.8s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Jerold! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: I can't get in the app because the app wants me to upload my job experience

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
That sounds like a bug with the work experience screen. Quit the app fully and reopen it — that usually fixes it. Give it another try after reopening.
